# Marketing Lead- Lifecycle & CRM

Direct message the job poster from Chapter 2

### Elissa Hunjan

#### Senior Talent Partner @IG Group

Our client is an established global fintech with an ambitious growth agenda. They blend advanced technology with deep industry expertise to create innovative, reliable, and high-performance solutions for their customers worldwide. This is an exciting opportunity to be part of their ongoing innovation and growth — shaping the next chapter of success for a trusted industry leader in a rapidly-expanding market with huge opportunity for personal and company growth.

We are hiring for a Lifecycle & CRM Lead in the Marketing hub in Singapore

Purpose: Own CRM channel strategy and execution, driving personalized, data-driven communications that engage customers and support business objectives across markets.

Key Responsibilities:

- Ensure CRM compliance with privacy regulations across all operating markets
- Monitor CRM metrics: deliverability, engagement, conversion, and revenue attribution
- Manage martech platforms and optimize technical capabilities
- Partner with lifecycle leads on integrated customer journey programs
- Drive testing agenda to continuously improve CRM performance metrics
- Own CRM calendar and coordinate campaigns across lifecycle stages
- Define segmentation strategies and personalization frameworks
- Manage CRM team including campaign developers and lifecycle marketers
- Lead CRM strategy across email, push, SMS, and in-app channels

Requirements:

- Stakeholder management skills to influence across marketing and product teams
- Financial services background highly desirable
- Project management capability to coordinate complex, multi-channel programs
- Understanding of data privacy regulations and consent management
- Experience with customer segmentation and personalization at scale
- Strong analytical skills with focus on testing, measurement, and optimization
- Deep knowledge of marketing automation platforms and CRM best practices
- Proven experience leading CRM teams and driving channel strategy
- Fast-moving Fintech/ Tech experience
- CRM and lifecycle marketing experience

description:
Ailytics hiring Go To Market (GTM) Lead in Singapore, Singapore | LinkedIn

### Go To Market (GTM) Lead

[Ailytics] Singapore, Singapore

Apply

# Go To Market (GTM) Lead

#### Ailytics Singapore, Singapore 2 days ago 87 applicants See who Ailytics has hired for this role

Apply [Save] 

- [Report this job] 

Direct message the job poster from Ailytics

### Ronald Cheung

#### Talent and Branding at Ailytics

Go To Market (GTM) Lead

Here at Ailytics, we’re building AI solutions to envision a safer world. By combining computer vision and predictive analytics, we enable organizations to proactively identify risks, optimize processes, and ultimately save lives. Our platforms are currently deployed all over the world, covering more than 500 million square meters!

We’re looking for a GTM Lead to work directly alongside our CEO. You’ll essentially be his right hand man/woman, and you’ll be leading efforts to expand our reach into new markets. This is one of our most critical positions and we’re searching for somebody that is able to be fully invested in the Ailytics mission.

This role involves significant travel and collaboration across multiple time zones. There will be periods of high intensity, particularly during new market entry. We believe in ownership and flexibility over rigid schedules, and this role is best suited for someone who is motivated by impact and autonomy rather than fixed working hours.

What You Will Be Doing

- Work alongside our Tech and Customer Success teams to help adapt our product to fit new market requirements.
- Lead early-stage commercial execution in new markets, from first conversations to first deals.
- Actively engage customers, partners, regulators, and ecosystem players on the ground.
- Represent Ailytics at industry events, trade shows, and key customer meetings globally.
- Design, validate, experiment and execute market entry strategies, including direct sales, channel partners, system integrators, and strategic alliances in regions such as America, Australia, Europe, and the Middle East.

Our Ideal Requirements

- An actual interest in what Ailytics is actually doing.
- Experience working in different cultural environments and being intellectually curious would be a big bonus.
- Prior experience in GTM, business development, or some related market expansion roles will be a must have.
- Ability to operate in an ambiguous and self-driven work environment. We do not have a GTM playbook, nor do we have a whole team for this. You + our CEO is the team.
- This is a high-ownership, high-impact role with periods of significant intensity. Success requires mental resilience, physical stamina, and comfort operating in demanding environments.

Why Work At Ailytics?

- Direct exposure to the CEO, accelerated knowledge of high stakes decisions across markets and influence on the company's direction.
- We value strong standards, high transparency, and low ego. Let us know if this sounds like you.
role_fit_rationale: GTM/BD-heavy role, not marketing management. Early-stage startup, heavy travel, misaligned seniority path.
skills_match_rationale: Needs sales/BD and market expansion experience; candidate's strengths are demand gen and martech.
company_snapshot: Small AI/computer vision startup, no GTM team yet. Glassdoor reviews appear mismatched (wrong company). Very sparse data.
red_flags: Two-person GTM team, high travel, ambiguous scope, no playbook
standout_positives: Direct CEO exposure, high autonomy and impact
